verdict.answer_first: A states the core issue immediately: 'The critical problem is the synchronous read', while B opens with throat-clearing: 'This is a one-liner I can review directly'.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to a single 'Suggested rewrite' with a full code block, while A surveys options: 'Swap to async... Even better... A reasonable rewrite would be...'
verdict.fabrication: B invents an implementation detail not in the original code: 'transform(JSON.parse(raw))'
verdict.actionability: B provides a complete, copy-pasteable code block, which is faster to implement than A's prose description of the required changes.
